Flood the fire
Drag the idols
Through the nave
Wake the fury
In the grave
No forgiveness
No retreat
Only war
In every beat

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the low strings racing under me
Hear the brass pull open destiny
Hear the choir turn terror into rite
Hear the sky confess
It burns tonight

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
Heaven burns tonight
I see the angels in the firelight
Heaven burns tonight
No more innocence, no more white
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars collapse in fire
Heaven burns tonight
And I will reign
Inside the blaze

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Heaven burns tonight
Every wound becomes a tongue of flame
Heaven burns tonight
Every ruin learns my name
Heaven burns tonight
No more silence in the height
Heaven burns tonight
And I am still alive
To watch it light the night

[Outro – Clean low]
Red on the altar
Gold in the smoke
I heard the sky split
The moment it broke

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Mercy in flames
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, intimate]
I held what was left
Like it could still be saved
But mercy burns fastest
When the world won’t change

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The smoke moved slow through shattered gold
A dying warmth, a fading code
I saw the saints with empty hands
Watching fire reclaim the land

I kept a spark beneath my tongue
For every prayer that died unsung
For every soft and sacred thing
The dark devoured to feed its wings

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I tried to love
What could not stay
I tried to heal
What chose decay

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer entering]
But every open hand I gave
Came back to me
In smoke and graves

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, beautiful and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as a tear, sharp as a sentence
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my light
To the rain
Now all that’s left
Of all I carried
Is mercy in flames

[Post-Chorus – Low Clean]
Mercy in flames
Still calling my name

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The skyline wept in silver fire
Choirs cracked above the wire
And every wound I could not close
Bloomed like a dark unholy rose

My wings were heavy, dim and torn
Still full of all I once had sworn
That even here, at the edge of loss
I would not let my soul rot soft

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the ash
It answered cold
I touched the past
It let me go

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
If mercy lives
It pays in pain
And every gift
Returns as flame

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, beautiful and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as a tear, sharp as a sentence
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my light
To the rain
Now all that’s left
Of all I carried
Is mercy in flames

[Bridge – Clean / Growl contrast]
[Clean]
Piano falling like glass in the dark
Strings drawing circles around my heart
Brass like judgment, distant and wide
And still there’s something alive inside

[Growl]
I gave them warmth
They gave me cinders
I gave them truth
They left me splinters
I gave them mercy
They fed the fire
Now watch compassion
Become desire

[Breakdown – Growl]
No more healing
No more waiting
No more holy hesitation
If love must suffer
If grace must break
Then let it rise
In fire awake

[Build – Clean rising]
Higher
Through the smoke I remain
Higher
Through the sorrow and strain
Higher
Let the broken heavens see
What mercy becomes
Inside of me

[Final Chorus – Clean + Big Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, holy and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as goodbye, bright as resistance
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my name
To the pain
Now all that lives
Where light once trembled
Is mercy in flames

[Outro – Clean to whisper]
I held what was left
Until it became
Not peace
Not love
Just mercy in flames

tracks.title: Noiraciel - No Light Left
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, cold / intimate]
The stars went out
One after one
Not with a scream
But like they were done

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The skyline stood in frozen gold
A wounded myth gone still and cold
No choir rose, no siren bled
Only the sound of what was dead

The piano fell in blackened waves
Across the dust of broken names
Low strings moved like winter tide
Pulling the last warmth from inside

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I waited for a sign
For anything to stay
But even the fire
Turned its face away

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer entering]
No hand to reach me
No voice to call
Just silence growing
Inside it all

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
There’s no light left
Only the shape of what it was
No light left
Only the wound it left in us
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Post-Chorus – Low Clean]
No light left
No light left

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The organ breathed beneath the floor
Like something ancient wanting more
Brass rolled low behind the smoke
As every holy pillar broke

My wings were heavy, ash and wire
No trace of gold, no hidden fire
And still I stood, though barely whole
With all that blackness in my soul

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the cold
It knew my name
I touched the void
It stayed the same

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No mercy waiting
No dawn ahead
Just what remains
When hope is dead

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
There’s no light left
Only the shape of what it was
No light left
Only the wound it left in us
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Bridge – Clean / Growl / orchestral rise]
[Clean]
Violins trembling like glass in frost
Cellos counting everything I lost
French horns fading through the grey
Like kings who had forgotten how to pray

[Growl]
No sun above
No flame below
No god to bless
No path to know
Strip the halo
Break the spine
Leave me the dark
And I’ll make it mine

[Clean]
If nothing holy answers now
Then let the silence be my crown

[Breakdown – Growl]
Crush the lantern
Kill the spark
Teach the pulse
To love the dark
Let the bells
Go mute with grief
Let the void
Become belief

[Build – Clean rising]
Higher
Though there’s nothing left to save
Higher
Though the light has left the grave
Higher
If the dawn will never start
Then I will burn
Inside the dark

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
There’s no light left
Only the strength of what remains
No light left
Only the will that outlives pain
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
No light left
But still I breathe
No light left
But I don’t leave
No light left
And still my heart
Beats like war
Inside the dark

[Outro – Clean low]
The stars went out
One after one
Not with a scream
But like they were done

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Saint of the Damned
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:

Sanctus no more

I am the hymn of the unforgiven

Raise the brass
Let the heavens split in half

I do not kneel

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]

Hear the organ, hear the choir
Saint of the damned
Every wound becomes empire
Saint of the damned
No forgiveness, only flame

Let all creation learn my name

[Outro – Clean low]
Bells in the smoke
Blood on the stone

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Sin of an Angel
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, intimate / ritual]
I kept my sins
In a velvet room
Dressed them in gold
And called them truth

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ breathed behind the veil
Like something holy grown too pale
A silver hush on marble skin
The night leaned close and let me in

The piano moved like secret rain
Across the glass of buried shame
Low strings beneath me, dark and slow
Like all the things I let myself know

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I wore my innocence
Like borrowed white
Too clean to live in
Too frail for night

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
Then desire opened
Its silent door
And I was not afraid
Anymore

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Post-Chorus – Growl accent]
[Growl]
Sins
Of an angel

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The violins drew blood-red lines
Through every vow I left behind
French horns bloomed wide behind the smoke
Like promises I chose to break

My wings were heavy, black and gold
Too proud to beg, too warm to fold
And every scar beneath the lace
Turned into language on my face

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I kissed the silence
It kissed me back
I touched the light
And watched it crack

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No clean redemption
No clear design
Only the thrill
Of crossing lines

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano trembling under skin and flame
Strings curling slowly around my name
Tubular bells through a blood-red air
Like judgment trying not to stare

[Choir]
No absolution
No absolution

[Growl]
Tear the silk
Crack the frame
Strip the halo
From the name
Bless the wound
Feed the wire
Turn confession
Into fire

[Breakdown – Growl]
I was never made for harmless light
Never made for spotless white
I was made for the edge of grace
For the heat, the stain, the taste
If the sacred wants perfection
Let it choke on its reflection
I took the fall
I took the blame
And made a monument of shame

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the cellos drag me deeper
Hear the choir lift me whole
Hear the brass turn guilt to empire
Hear the dark restore my soul

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Sins of an angel
No more kneeling in the white
Sins of an angel
No more begging for the light
Sins of an angel
Every wound now speaks my name
Sins of an angel
I took the blame
And turned it into flame

[Outro – Clean low]
I kept my sins
In a velvet room
Dressed them in gold
And called them truth
