[Breakdown – Growl]
Burn the veil
Break the seal
Make the dying heavens feel
Split the gold
Flood the choir
Name the sovereign of the fire
Iron breath
Molten vein
I turn collapse into domain

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the timpani under my pulse
Hear the choir enter the flame
Hear the brass drag open the sky

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
Crown of fire
Set on my head by the end of the world
Crown of fire
Forged from the ruin where heaven unfurled
Raise the horns
Raise the drums
Let the last procession come
Crown of fire
I wear the flame
And make the apocalypse kneel

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Crown of fire
No forgiveness in the light
Crown of fire
Only empire in the night
Crown of fire
Every scar becomes a throne
Crown of fire
I made the end
My own

[Outro – Clean low]
Gold in the ashes
Flame in the wire
I did not inherit

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Darkness Made Divine
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, low / ritual]
I watched the black
Learn how to shine
Not as the end
But as design

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ rolled through hollow height
Like ancient blood inside the night
The arches trembled, red and gold
As if the dark had taken hold

Violins burned in silver lines
Low cellos dragged the edge of time
French horns rose wide like judgment’s breath
Announcing something worse than death

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
No light to follow
No law above
No pure instruction
No saintly love

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
Only the silence
Only the sign
Only the hour
Darkness made divine

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Darkness made divine
Crowned in the fire where the heavens declined
Darkness made divine
Born from the wound and the fall of the light
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars bow down to the higher fire
Darkness made divine
I saw the end
And called it mine

[Post-Chorus – Growl]
[Growl]
Divine
Darkness made divine

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The piano struck like iron rain
Across the marble, ash, and flame
Each note a fracture in the veil
Each breath a kingdom gone to fail

My wings were wide with soot and gold
No longer lost, no longer cold
What once was grief became command
What once was fear now filled my hands

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the void
It answered clear
I touched the ruin
It drew me near

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No god to name me
No throne to bind
I took the dark
And made it rise

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Darkness made divine
Crowned in the fire where the heavens declined
Darkness made divine
Born from the wound and the fall of the light
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars bow down to the higher fire
Darkness made divine
I saw the end
And called it mine

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano under a bleeding dome
Strings like oceans too vast for home
Tubular bells through a ruinous sky
And something in me opened wide

[Choir]
No more dawn
No more dawn

[Growl]
Split the marble
Flood the nave
Wake the empire
In the grave
Break the halo
Bend the spire
Make the silence
Feed the fire

[Breakdown – Growl]
This is no absence
This is ascent
This is the shape
Of a higher descent
This is no ending
No fading sign
This is the black
Becoming divine
Brass and thunder
Bone and flame
I gave the nameless
A holy name

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the low strings pull me deeper
Hear the choir widen the sky
Hear the brass make terror royal

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
Darkness made divine
Crowned in the fire where the heavens declined
Darkness made divine
Born from the wound and the fall of the light
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars bow down to the higher fire
Darkness made divine
I saw the end

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Darkness made divine
No more begging for the day
Darkness made divine
No more turning fear away
Darkness made divine
Every scar now forms a sign
Darkness made divine
I took the night
And made it shrine

[Outro – Clean low]
I watched the black
Learn how to shine
Not as the end
But as design

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Fallen Without Fear
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Ooh
Ooh
Ooh
Fallen without fear

[Verse 1]
I hit the ground but never broke
I wore the fire, I breathed the smoke
The heavens watched me disappear
But I came back remade and clear

The crown was cracked, the throne was gone
Still I could feel the pressure burn
A thousand voices called it fate
I called it fuel, I called it shape

[Pre-Chorus]
No mourning
No surrender
No holy hand to pull me under
I felt the dark
I kept it near
And now I’m fallen without fear

[Chorus]
Fallen without fear
I rise with the end in my blood
Fallen without fear
I bloom where the angels were cut
No halo left to save me
No heaven left to hear
I walk through fire smiling
Fallen without fear

[Post-Chorus]
Oh-oh
Fallen without fear
Oh-oh
I’m still here
Oh-oh
Fallen without fear
I rise, I rise

[Verse 2]
The skyline bent beneath the weight
Of all the gods who came too late
Their golden tongues, their empty light
Could never teach me how to fight

My wings were torn but standing wide
Like black flags in a blood-red sky
And every scar became a sign
That what survived was truly mine

[Pre-Chorus]
No pleading
No devotion
Just iron pulse and pure emotion
I faced the void
It made me clear
And now I’m fallen without fear

[Chorus]
Fallen without fear
I rise with the end in my blood
Fallen without fear
I bloom where the angels were cut
No halo left to save me
No heaven left to hear
I walk through fire smiling
Fallen without fear

[Bridge]
Piano like impact
Brass like command
Strings like the stormline
Opening land

I did not shatter
I did not drown
I took the silence
And wore it like a crown

If this is exile
Then let it reign
If this is ruin
Then let it sing my name

[Build]
Higher
With the pressure in my lungs
Higher
With the anthem on my tongue
Higher
Let the broken choirs hear
I was born for this
Fallen without fear

[Final Chorus]
Fallen without fear
I rise with the end in my blood
Fallen without fear
I bloom where the angels were cut
No halo left to save me
No heaven left to hear
I walk through worlds collapsing
Fallen without fear

[Outro]
Fallen without fear
Still burning
Still burning
Fallen without fear
Still here

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Heaven Burns Tonight
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Choir / Clean low]
Red on the altar
Gold in the smoke
I heard the sky split
The moment it broke

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ shook the shattered dome
Like judgment finally coming home
Black fire climbed the cathedral spine
And turned the sacred into mine

The violins screamed in fevered light
Low cellos dragged the end through night
French horns rolled out like kings at war
And every prayer became a roar

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
No rain above us
No mercy falls
Only the embers
On holy walls

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No saints remaining
No gates in sight
Only the truth
Heaven burns tonight

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Heaven burns tonight
I see the angels in the firelight
Heaven burns tonight
No more innocence, no more white
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars collapse in fire
Heaven burns tonight
And I will stand
Inside the blaze

[Post-Chorus – Growl]
[Growl]
Burn
Burn
Heaven burns tonight

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The towers cracked in molten red
As bells rang out above the dead
Brass like thunder split the haze
And clothed the ruins in a blaze

My wings were black with ash and wire
Still opening wider through the pyre
No fear remained, no god to name
Only the right to feed the flame

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the furnace
I took the brand
I watched the sky
Fall through my hands

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No throne can hold me
No light can hide
I kissed the end
And called it mine

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Heaven burns tonight
I see the angels in the firelight
Heaven burns tonight
No more innocence, no more white
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars collapse in fire
Heaven burns tonight
And I will stand
Inside the blaze

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano falling like black rain
Strings spiraling higher through the pain
Tubular bells over blood-red air
And still I rise
And still I dare

[Choir]
Dies irae
Dies irae

[Growl]
Bass trombones tearing
Stone from bone
Taikos calling
Take the throne
Cimbassi roaring
Vaults ignite
This is the hour
Heaven burns tonight

[Breakdown – Growl]
Break the halo
Crack the spire
Drown the silence
Flood the fire
Drag the idols
Through the nave
Wake the fury
In the grave
No forgiveness
No retreat
Only war
In every beat

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the low strings racing under me
Hear the brass pull open destiny
Hear the choir turn terror into rite
Hear the sky confess
It burns tonight

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
Heaven burns tonight
I see the angels in the firelight
Heaven burns tonight
No more innocence, no more white
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the stars collapse in fire
Heaven burns tonight
And I will reign
Inside the blaze

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Heaven burns tonight
Every wound becomes a tongue of flame
Heaven burns tonight
Every ruin learns my name
Heaven burns tonight
No more silence in the height
Heaven burns tonight
And I am still alive
To watch it light the night

[Outro – Clean low]
Red on the altar
Gold in the smoke
I heard the sky split
The moment it broke

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Mercy in flames
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, intimate]
I held what was left
Like it could still be saved
But mercy burns fastest
When the world won’t change

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The smoke moved slow through shattered gold
A dying warmth, a fading code
I saw the saints with empty hands
Watching fire reclaim the land

I kept a spark beneath my tongue
For every prayer that died unsung
For every soft and sacred thing
The dark devoured to feed its wings

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I tried to love
What could not stay
I tried to heal
What chose decay

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer entering]
But every open hand I gave
Came back to me
In smoke and graves

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, beautiful and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as a tear, sharp as a sentence
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my light
To the rain
Now all that’s left
Of all I carried
Is mercy in flames

[Post-Chorus – Low Clean]
Mercy in flames
Still calling my name

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The skyline wept in silver fire
Choirs cracked above the wire
And every wound I could not close
Bloomed like a dark unholy rose

My wings were heavy, dim and torn
Still full of all I once had sworn
That even here, at the edge of loss
I would not let my soul rot soft

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the ash
It answered cold
I touched the past
It let me go

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
If mercy lives
It pays in pain
And every gift
Returns as flame

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, beautiful and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as a tear, sharp as a sentence
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my light
To the rain
Now all that’s left
Of all I carried
Is mercy in flames

[Bridge – Clean / Growl contrast]
[Clean]
Piano falling like glass in the dark
Strings drawing circles around my heart
Brass like judgment, distant and wide
And still there’s something alive inside

[Growl]
I gave them warmth
They gave me cinders
I gave them truth
They left me splinters
I gave them mercy
They fed the fire
Now watch compassion
Become desire

[Breakdown – Growl]
No more healing
No more waiting
No more holy hesitation
If love must suffer
If grace must break
Then let it rise
In fire awake

[Build – Clean rising]
Higher
Through the smoke I remain
Higher
Through the sorrow and strain
Higher
Let the broken heavens see
What mercy becomes
Inside of me

[Final Chorus – Clean + Big Growl Layer]
Mercy in flames
Burning through me, holy and vicious
Mercy in flames
Soft as goodbye, bright as resistance
I gave my heart
To the ruins
I gave my name
To the pain
Now all that lives
Where light once trembled
Is mercy in flames

[Outro – Clean to whisper]
I held what was left
Until it became
Not peace
Not love
Just mercy in flames

tracks.title: Noiraciel - No Light Left
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, cold / intimate]
The stars went out
One after one
Not with a scream
But like they were done

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The skyline stood in frozen gold
A wounded myth gone still and cold
No choir rose, no siren bled
Only the sound of what was dead

The piano fell in blackened waves
Across the dust of broken names
Low strings moved like winter tide
Pulling the last warmth from inside

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I waited for a sign
For anything to stay
But even the fire
Turned its face away

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer entering]
No hand to reach me
No voice to call
Just silence growing
Inside it all

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
There’s no light left
Only the shape of what it was
No light left
Only the wound it left in us
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Post-Chorus – Low Clean]
No light left
No light left

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The organ breathed beneath the floor
Like something ancient wanting more
Brass rolled low behind the smoke
As every holy pillar broke

My wings were heavy, ash and wire
No trace of gold, no hidden fire
And still I stood, though barely whole
With all that blackness in my soul

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I touched the cold
It knew my name
I touched the void
It stayed the same

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No mercy waiting
No dawn ahead
Just what remains
When hope is dead

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
There’s no light left
Only the shape of what it was
No light left
Only the wound it left in us
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Bridge – Clean / Growl / orchestral rise]
[Clean]
Violins trembling like glass in frost
Cellos counting everything I lost
French horns fading through the grey
Like kings who had forgotten how to pray

[Growl]
No sun above
No flame below
No god to bless
No path to know
Strip the halo
Break the spine
Leave me the dark
And I’ll make it mine

[Clean]
If nothing holy answers now
Then let the silence be my crown

[Breakdown – Growl]
Crush the lantern
Kill the spark
Teach the pulse
To love the dark
Let the bells
Go mute with grief
Let the void
Become belief

[Build – Clean rising]
Higher
Though there’s nothing left to save
Higher
Though the light has left the grave
Higher
If the dawn will never start
Then I will burn
Inside the dark

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
There’s no light left
Only the strength of what remains
No light left
Only the will that outlives pain
The heavens closed
The embers died
The angels learned
How not to cry
There’s no light left
So I became
What survives the dark

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
No light left
But still I breathe
No light left
But I don’t leave
No light left
And still my heart
Beats like war
Inside the dark

[Outro – Clean low]
The stars went out
One after one
Not with a scream
But like they were done

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Saint of the Damned
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Choir / Clean whisper]
Bells in the smoke
Blood on the stone
I heard the dead
Call me their own

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ roared through fractured glass
As blackened banners rose at last
Cathedrals bent beneath the sound
Of iron wings above the ground

The violins were blades of grief
The cellos dragged the world beneath
Low horns rolled out like coming war
And every gate became a door

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
No blessing left
No throne above
No holy law
No sacred blood

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
Only the choir
Only the scar
Only the name
They gave my dark

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Saint of the damned
Crowned in fire, baptized in ruin
Saint of the damned
I am the hymn of the unforgiven
Raise the drums
Raise the brass
Let the heavens split in half
Saint of the damned
I do not kneel
I make the fallen rise

[Post-Chorus – Growl]
[Growl]
Saint
Of the damned

[Verse 2 – Clean]
Timpani thundered under bone
The war drums shook the pillars’ stone
Trombones like judgment filled the air
And still I climbed, and still I dared

My shadow crossed the altar wide
A black eclipse with gold inside
The choir burned behind my breath
A living rite, a dressed-up death

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I kissed the ash
I broke the seal
I touched the dark
And made it real

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No saint can save me
No god can stand
I took damnation
And made it grand

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
Saint of the damned
Crowned in fire, baptized in ruin
Saint of the damned
I am the hymn of the unforgiven
Raise the drums
Raise the brass
Let the heavens split in half
Saint of the damned
I do not kneel
I make the fallen rise

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano crashing like winter light
Violins screaming through the night
French horns calling like kings to war
And I wanted more
I wanted more

[Choir]
Sanctus no more
Sanctus no more

[Growl]
Pipe organ howling
Columns break
Taikos calling
Make them shake
Cimbassi roaring
Veins ignite
I was not made
For a gentle light

[Breakdown – Growl]
Strike the bells
Split the sky
Drag the golden idols high
Break the vault
Flood the nave
Wake the fury in the grave
Brass and thunder
Bone and flame
Let the world remember my name

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the violins ascending
Hear the low brass bending fate
Hear the choir of the cursed
Turn the end into a gate

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
Saint of the damned
Crowned in fire, baptized in ruin
Saint of the damned
I am the hymn of the unforgiven
Raise the drums
Raise the brass
Let the heavens split in half
Saint of the damned
I do not kneel
I make the fallen rise

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Saint of the damned
Hear the organ, hear the choir
Saint of the damned
Every wound becomes empire
Saint of the damned
No forgiveness, only flame
Saint of the damned
Let all creation learn my name

[Outro – Clean low]
Bells in the smoke
Blood on the stone
I heard the dead
Call me their own

tracks.title: Noiraciel - Sin of an Angel
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, intimate / ritual]
I kept my sins
In a velvet room
Dressed them in gold
And called them truth

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ breathed behind the veil
Like something holy grown too pale
A silver hush on marble skin
The night leaned close and let me in

The piano moved like secret rain
Across the glass of buried shame
Low strings beneath me, dark and slow
Like all the things I let myself know

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
I wore my innocence
Like borrowed white
Too clean to live in
Too frail for night

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
Then desire opened
Its silent door
And I was not afraid
Anymore

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Post-Chorus – Growl accent]
[Growl]
Sins
Of an angel

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The violins drew blood-red lines
Through every vow I left behind
French horns bloomed wide behind the smoke
Like promises I chose to break

My wings were heavy, black and gold
Too proud to beg, too warm to fold
And every scar beneath the lace
Turned into language on my face

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I kissed the silence
It kissed me back
I touched the light
And watched it crack

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No clean redemption
No clear design
Only the thrill
Of crossing lines

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano trembling under skin and flame
Strings curling slowly around my name
Tubular bells through a blood-red air
Like judgment trying not to stare

[Choir]
No absolution
No absolution

[Growl]
Tear the silk
Crack the frame
Strip the halo
From the name
Bless the wound
Feed the wire
Turn confession
Into fire

[Breakdown – Growl]
I was never made for harmless light
Never made for spotless white
I was made for the edge of grace
For the heat, the stain, the taste
If the sacred wants perfection
Let it choke on its reflection
I took the fall
I took the blame
And made a monument of shame

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the cellos drag me deeper
Hear the choir lift me whole
Hear the brass turn guilt to empire
Hear the dark restore my soul

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
These are the sins of an angel
Soft in the mouth, sharp in the vein
These are the sins of an angel
Sweet as the fall, bright as the pain
Raise the choir
Lower the sky
Let the pure watch the pure divide
These are the sins of an angel
And I will wear them
Like a crown

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
Sins of an angel
No more kneeling in the white
Sins of an angel
No more begging for the light
Sins of an angel
Every wound now speaks my name
Sins of an angel
I took the blame
And turned it into flame

[Outro – Clean low]
I kept my sins
In a velvet room
Dressed them in gold
And called them truth

tracks.title: Noiraciel - The Devil Knows My Name
tracks.filename: Noiraciel - The Devil Knows My Name.wav
tracks.album: The Blind Angel — Intimate Metal Sessions
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Clean, low / ritual]
I never asked for mercy
I never begged for grace
By the time the sky went silent
Even hell knew my face

[Verse 1 – Clean]
The organ shook the blackened vault
Like judgment choking on its fault
The marble sweated ash and heat
As war drums gathered under me

Violins carved through molten air
Like whispers no one else could bear
Low brass rolled out in waves of dread
Like every curse I’d ever fed

[Pre-Chorus – Clean building]
No white remains
No innocence
No sacred shield
No consequence

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
Only the echo
Only the flame
Only the truth
The devil knows my name

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
The devil knows my name
Spoke it in fire, carved it in shadow
The devil knows my name
Heard it rise where the fallen angels go
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the underworld answer the higher fire
The devil knows my name
And heaven learned
To fear it too

[Post-Chorus – Growl]
[Growl]
Knows my name
Knows my name

[Verse 2 – Clean]
The grand piano struck like chains
Pulled through gold and acid rain
French horns called from beneath the smoke
Like ancient vows already broke

My wings were black with embered scars
Still sharp enough to wound the stars
And every step across the stone
Sounded less like loss
More like a throne

[Pre-Chorus – Clean]
I wore the wound
I wore the brand
I took the dark
Into my hands

[Pre-Chorus – Growl layer]
No saint can cleanse me
No light can claim
I crossed the line
And kept the name

[Chorus – Clean + Growl Layer]
The devil knows my name
Spoke it in fire, carved it in shadow
The devil knows my name
Heard it rise where the fallen angels go
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the underworld answer the higher fire
The devil knows my name
And heaven learned
To fear it too

[Bridge – Clean / Choir / Growl]
[Clean]
Grand piano under a blood-red sky
Strings climbing higher like they wanted to die
Tubular bells through the sulfur haze
And every note set stone ablaze

[Choir]
Name by fire
Name by fire

[Growl]
Break the halo
Crack the bone
Let the righteous die alone
Flood the altar
Split the frame
I made the dark
Remember my name

[Breakdown – Growl]
I am the whisper in the furnace
I am the oath that never broke
I am the scar beneath the blessing
I am the hand around the throat
Drag the choir through the cinders
Let the velvet heavens choke
There is no prayer left in this body
Only the will to be invoked

[Orchestral Lift – Clean]
Hear the low strings hunting under me
Hear the brass open destiny
Hear the choir turn dread to flame
Hear the night repeat my name

[Final Chorus – Clean + Huge Growl Layer + Choir]
The devil knows my name
Spoke it in fire, carved it in shadow
The devil knows my name
Heard it rise where the fallen angels go
Raise the drums
Raise the choir
Let the underworld answer the higher fire
The devil knows my name
And heaven learned
To fear it too

[Final Lift – Clean / Choir]
The devil knows my name
Not as a warning, but a crown
The devil knows my name
Not as a secret, but a sound
The devil knows my name
Every scar became acclaim
The devil knows my name
And I became
The flame

[Outro – Clean low]
I never asked for mercy
I never begged for grace
By the time the sky went silent
Even hell knew my face

To war
